description: A modern to-do app built with Jetpack Compose and Material Design 3. Do-It is a clean, distraction-free to-do app that helps you stay on top of your tasks. Features - View open and completed todos in separate sections - Add and edit todos with a title, optional description, and optional deadline - Mark todos complete or incomplete with a single tap - Multi-select todos via long-press, then bulk-delete or select all - Motivational empty-state messages when the list is empty or everything is done - Edge-to-edge UI following Material Design 3 guidelines Open Source Do-It is free and open-source software, licensed under the Apache License 2.0. No ads, no tracking, no accounts required.
